events.name: Boston Red Sox at Baltimore Orioles

headlines.description: — Andruw Monasterio hit a grand slam as part of a 10-run ninth inning and the Boston Red Sox snapped a four-game skid with a 17-1 victory over the Baltimore Orioles on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Red Sox erupt for 10 runs in the ninth, beat Orioles 17-1

events.name: Seattle Mariners at St. Louis Cardinals

headlines.description: — Julio Rodríguez, Will Wilson and Cole Young each homered, and Leo Rivas hit a two-run single in the ninth to help the Seattle Mariners beat the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Mariners outlast Cardinals 11-9 in game that featured 8 home runs

events.name: Cleveland Guardians at Toronto Blue Jays

headlines.description: — Kazuma Okamoto homered for the second straight game, Andrés Giménez hit a two-run single and the Toronto Blue Jays beat the Cleveland Guardians 5-3 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Okamoto homers for second straight game, drives in two as Blue Jays beat Guardians 5-3

events.name: Miami Marlins at San Francisco Giants

headlines.description: — Casey Schmidt hit a two-run homer, Drew Gilbert and Heliot Ramos added solo shots and the San Francisco Giants beat the Miami Marlins 6-2 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Schmidt, Gilbert and Ramos hit home runs as the Giants beat the Marlins 6-2

events.name: Colorado Rockies at New York Mets
Minnesota Twins at Tampa Bay Rays

headlines.description: — Shane McClanahan turned in five scoreless innings to get his first win at Tropicana Field in nearly three years as the Tampa Bay Rays beat the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Shane McClanahan wins at Tropicana Field for 1st time in nearly 3 years as Rays beat Twins 6-1

events.name: Washington Nationals at Chicago White Sox

headlines.description: — Nasim Nunez drove in four runs, including two in the top of the 10th inning, as the Washington Nationals beat the Chicago White Sox 6-3 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nasim Nunez drives in 4, Washington Nationals beat the Chicago White Sox 6-3 in 10 innings

events.name: San Diego Padres at Arizona Diamondbacks

notes.headline: MLB World Tour: Mexico City Series

headlines.description: — Josh Jung hit a go-ahead, two-run home run in the sixth inning in the Texas Rangers' 4-3 victory over the Athletics on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Jung hits 2-run homer in 6th to push the Rangers past the Athletics, 4-3

events.name: Los Angeles Angels at Kansas City Royals

headlines.description: — Cole Ragans struck out 11 in six sharp innings and Nick Loftin had a career-high four RBI as the Kansas City Royals routed the Los Angeles Angels 12-1 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cole Ragans strikes out 11 in 6 innings as Royals blow out Angels 12-1

events.name: New York Yankees at Houston Astros

headlines.description: — Austin Wells hit a tiebreaking homer in the seventh inning and the New York Yankees extended their winning streak to eight games with an 8-3 victory over the Houston Astros on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wells hits go-ahead homer in 7th and Yankees beat Astros 8-3 to extend winning streak to 8 games

headlines.description: — Bryan Reynolds had a go-ahead single in the 10th, Nick Gonzales followed with a two-run single and the Pittsburgh Pirates beat the Milwaukee Brewers 6-3 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Reynolds, Gonzales help the Pirates outlast the Brewers, 6-3 in 10 innings

headlines.description: — Sal Stewart hit a three-run home run and drove in five runs as the Cincinnati Reds beat the Detroit Tigers 9-2 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sal Stewart's 3-run HR, 5 RBIs, help Reds beat Tigers 9-2

events.name: Chicago Cubs at Los Angeles Dodgers

headlines.description: — Roki Sasaki earned his second major league victory and the Los Angeles Dodgers rallied with six runs in the fourth inning to beat the Cubs 12-4 on Saturday night, snapping Chicago's 10-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dodgers score 6 runs in 4th to snap the Cubs' 10-game winning streak with 12-4 victory
